role: Commander, Fatehin Unit, IRGC Special Forces (d. 1 April 2026)
bio: Mohammad Ali Fathalizadeh commanded the Fatehin Unit, an [IRGC](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-guard-corps) special forces formation. He was killed on 1 April 2026 during the [March 2026 Strike Wave](/events/march-2026-strike-wave).
editorial_notes: Killed 1 April 2026. Commander of IRGC Fatehin special forces unit.
